Detailed Description

Input Channel Systems - USB/UART
System IDs: 0x50 through 0x57

+----------------+------+-------------+----------+-------------+---------+---------------------------------------+
| Register Name  | Id   | Type        | Unit     | Range       | Default | Comment                               |
+================+======+=============+==========+=============+=========+=======================================+
| current        | 0x00 | float 32-bit| A        | -0.7 to 0.7 | 0.0     |                                       |
+----------------+------+-------------+----------+-------------+---------+---------------------------------------+
